title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Poisons Act, 1919. 1 [(2) It extends to the whole of India: Provided that it shall not apply to the State of Jammu and Kashmir* except to the extent to which the provisions of this Act relate to the importation into India of any specified poison.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 47 of 1958, s. 2, for the former sub-section (2). *. Vide Notification No. S.O. 3912 (E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
